Package com.saperion.connector.rmi

Class SaRMIServerInfo

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.connector.rmi.SaRMIServerInfo
public class SaRMIServerInfo extends Object
Holds the information about the Saperion RMI Server state.
States are e.g.
- running
- stopped
Author:
rbo
